_d5_retrofit_note: Retrofitted by D5 sprint 2026-06-03. v1.6.0 → v1.7.0: existing zones Z1 (perimeter) and Z2 (interior) both default to purpose='circulation' per ZP-05 (BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2 — reception lobby is a circulation area, NOT subject to task/surrounding/background ratios; Em looked up from lux-levels.json circulation.lobby branch = 300 lx); all 30 LED downlights default to mount_type='recessed' per MT-01; per_zone_achieved[] populated from existing achieved_illuminance_lux=302.4 lx (zone-level circulation achievement equals room-level since all 30 luminaires share the same uniform grid). Engineering content unchanged; honest disclosure mirrored in output.calculation_summary.assumptions[], output.rationale.sections[], and reasoning.md §D5.

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 100mm narrow-beam recessed LED downlight, 3000K, prismatic lens. Distribution: Gaussian sigma=FWHM/2.355 per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical reflector luminaire. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
